---
title: "R training"
format: html
author: "Sarah Goforth"
date: 2026-03-18
editor: visual
---

I am learning R! I don't need to add a \# when it's not in a code "chunk"


```{r}
source("training_source.R")

```

```{r}
#notes for coders
```

```{r}
3
4
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
"text strings are fun!"
typeof("strings")

```

```{r}
a <- c(1,2,3)
a

c("a", "b", "c")
c(TRUE, FALSE)
c(1, "two", 3)

```

```{r}
csv_path <- "../data/raw/presurvey_20260317.csv"
survey_raw <- rio::import(csv_path)
```
